lines: Mwami, ndakwimitse : wime Mu mutima wanjye, Sinibagirweya mahwa : Njyan' i Gologota !
Ibyabay’i Getsemane N’ibyo wababajwe byose, Sinzobyibagirwe, Mwami: Njyan’i Gologota.
Unyereke ya mva, Mwami,Aho bagushyize, Aho marayika wera Yaray' ataramye.
Nje nka Mariya, Mukiza, Kukurabukira; Nsanz’imva y’ irimw ubusa; Nshimy’Uwanzukiye!
Unkorer’ umusaraba,Niyange, mb’uwawe; Nsangire naw’ igikombe Wanyoye kubwanjye.Ndengera  Ndengera Mwami wanjye, ndengera
